headline: How The Phillips 66 (PSX) Investment Story Is Shifting As Analysts Rework Fair Value Targets
summary: The latest update nudges Phillips 66's internal fair value estimate from US$157.55 to US$160.15, edging the modeled price target band modestly higher. That move sits alongside recent Street research that has clustered price targets in roughly the mid to high US$150s, with bulls and bears split over how to treat refining, midstream and commodity risks. Read on to see what is driving those different views and how you can keep track of the evolving Phillips 66 story. Analyst Price Targets don't...
